title: KeegCraft
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack with cosmetic and performance based changes. Mainly cosmetic and quality of life improvements such as extra animations, a minimap, chest sorting button, controller support, as well as optifine parity using fabric alternatives.
body:
A Vanilla+ Modpack with cosmetic and performance based changes. Largely based on Fabulously Optimized and modified for use on the KeegCraft Server. Mainly graphics and quality of life improvements that work for single player and server.

Visit us at KeegCraft.Neocities.org
